blended.narrative: Keystone is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.4 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 8,181 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.4" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.6" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 35".
